name: zombie tide incoming Rising
short_description: "Zombie Tide Incoming: Rising" is an immersive first-person shooter. After the apocalypse, you will face a world overwhelmed by a tide of zombies.
detailed_description:
The game is set during the apocalypse, where many people have turned into vicious zombies. You will face hordes of zombies that come at you like a tidal wave.

You can choose from various powerful weapons to fulfill your fantasies—whether it's destroying a large group of zombies with a grenade or sweeping the road with a shotgun, taking down one zombie with each shot.

The game features an extensive upgrade system, allowing you to freely enhance weapons, grenades, Molotov cocktails, and your own attributes with gold. As your combat power grows, you can take on increasingly difficult levels.
